CustomField.description: For FONSIs: documents why no significant impacts were found. For RODs: summarizes unavoidable adverse impacts disclosed per 40 CFR 1505.2(c). Empty for CE Determinations where extraordinary circumstances were not triggered.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Significant impact findings (or the basis for finding none). Required disclosure for FONSIs and RODs.
CustomField.label: Significant Impact Findings
